actionType.title: Action Type
actionType.description: The specific modification to perform. Choose one: 'Cancel' or 'Reschedule'.

appointmentNumber.title: Appointment number
appointmentNumber.description: Human-readable appointment number from the patient confirmation (e.g. SA-0017). Not a Salesforce record Id.

patientLookupEmail.title: Patient email address (lookup identifier)
patientLookupEmail.description: The patient's email address used only as a lookup key to find their Person Account and Contact. This is NOT an outbound email message and this action does NOT send email. Pass a single plain email address string in the form name@example.com (for example priya.sharma@example.com). Do NOT pass a JSON object, a Map, or any wrapper. Do NOT include recipientId, recipient, to, cc, bcc, from, subject, body, or message. Do NOT construct an email payload of any kind. If the user provided their email earlier in the conversation, copy that plain string verbatim. Never a Salesforce record Id.

newStartTime.title: New Start Time
newStartTime.description: The date and time requested for the reschedule, formatted as a standard Date/Time string. Leave blank if performing a 'Cancel' action.
